parsed.production_notes: Both characters exhibit uncanny smoothness and perfectly consistent lighting typical of AI generation. Their lip movements are slightly disconnected from the audio, and their head movements are repetitive and robotic.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a fair complexion and a blonde, straight bob haircut. She has symmetrical, smooth facial features and light-colored eyes.
characters.wardrobe: A beige blazer worn over a simple white top.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a tanned complexion and short, voluminous curly brown hair. She has dark eyes and wears small gold hoop earrings and layered thin gold necklaces.
characters.wardrobe: A black top with thin spaghetti straps.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, engaged, and eager to learn.

scenes.setting: Indistinct, blurred indoor environments. The top panel has a bright, cool-toned background, while the bottom panel has a warmer, slightly darker background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A positioned in the center of the frame. She is looking directly at the camera with a neutral, pleasant expression. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting her blonde bob and beige blazer. The background is heavily blurred, suggesting a modern, well-lit interior space with cool tones.

A close-up shot of Character B, framed centrally. She looks directly at the camera, her facial expressions changing dynamically as she speaks and listens. The lighting is warm, accentuating her tanned skin and curly brown hair. She wears a black strap top and gold jewelry. The background is a blurred, warm-toned indoor setting.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with Character A on top and Character B on the bottom. Both characters appear to be on a video call, looking directly at the viewer. Speech bubbles pop up next to each character as they speak, displaying their dialogue. A blue app logo is visible in the top left corner.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: That movie was amazing, right?
Character B says: Yes, I am agree!
Character A says: Do you mean I agree?
Character B says: Wait, no "am"?
Character A says: Nope - "agree" is already a verb. We just say I agree.
Character B says: Got it. I agree to practice more!
Character A says: Perfect.
Character B says: I wish someone corrected me like that every time.
Character A says: I can! I'm an AI tutor in Fluently.
Character B says: Really?
Character A says: Yes, we can talk every day, and I'll help you sound more natural.
Character B says: That's great! Let's talk again tomorrow.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, dark purple gradient background. There are no characters, props, or distinct environmental features present. The lighting is a soft, central vignette effect.
